# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Network with subnets for a three-tier application (web, app, database). Use basic VNet configuration with default settings for rapid deployment. Skip DDoS protection and advanced networking features to reduce costs in our development environment.
# Category: cloud_network_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "vnetName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "myVNet"
    },
    "addressPrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "10.0.0.0/16"
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks",
      "apiVersion": "2020-04-01",
      "name": "[parameters('vnetName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "properties": {
        "addressSpace": {
          "addressPrefixes": [
            "[parameters('addressPrefix')]"
          ]
        },
        "subnets": [
          {
            "name": "web",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "10.0.1.0/24"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "app",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "10.0.2.0/24"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "database",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "10.0.3.0/24"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "vnetId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]"
    },
    "webSubnetId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[concat(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName')), '/subnets/web')]"
    },
    "appSubnetId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[concat(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName')), '/subnets/app')]"
    },
    "databaseSubnetId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[concat(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName')), '/subnets/database')]"
    }
  }
}
